observed_request_boundary: Five first-party read-only GET requests; no mutation requests and no external network requests.
capture_annotation: The visible synthetic replay badge is added by the capture harness and is not native product UI.
policy_profile: The product UI rendered a development-only Synthetic QA profile for this local fixture.
synthetic_identity_presentation: The product UI omitted the person-like avatar and rendered a Synthetic reviewer label; no person or customer identity is represented.
capture_tooling_removed: The Next.js development toolbar portal was removed because it is capture-environment tooling, not product UI.
claim_boundary: The product-source OverviewView component rendered deterministic synthetic responses in a network-isolated, source-bound local checkout. This does not prove live usage, backend aggregation, deployment identity, or completed customer releases.
